svg.title: Regulatory margin and capital stack
svg.desc: Risk and regulatory stack from trades and sensitivities to initial margin, variation margin, capital, stress, and controls.
svg.text: Trade population, CSA, netting sets, legal entity, collateral terms
Sensitivities, scenarios, risk factors, liquidity horizons
Variation margin, initial margin, SIMM, CCP margin, stress add-ons
Capital, FRTB, stress capital, margin explain, governance controls
The analytics contract is legal and operational as much as quantitative: netting, collateral, eligibility, model version, and reporting date all change the result.
